test/entitlement/regression.purpose: Integration regression test suite for the entitlement + credit engine, wiring real Ent/Postgres adapters against a MockStreamingConnector to reproduce and guard against specific grant burn-down, expiry, voiding, and reset edge cases.

patterns.name: Self-contained dependency bootstrap via setupDependencies
patterns.description: Each test calls setupDependencies(t) which constructs every adapter and service from underlying package constructors (no app/common), returning a Dependencies struct. Tests call deps.Close() via defer.

patterns.name: Controlled clock advancement with defer reset
patterns.description: Every test calls defer clock.ResetTime() at the top, then drives time forward with clock.SetTime(testutils.GetRFC3339Time(t, "...")) before each operation to reproduce a precise temporal scenario.

patterns.name: MockStreamingConnector for usage events
patterns.description: deps.Streaming (streamingtestutils.MockStreamingConnector) is used to inject synthetic usage events via AddSimpleEvent; never real ClickHouse.

patterns.name: No app/common imports in test wiring
patterns.description: All adapters and services are instantiated directly from their own constructors (e.g. customeradapter.New, customerservice.New, entitlementservice.NewEntitlementService) to keep test helpers independent from the DI layer.

patterns.name: createCustomerAndSubject helper for test subjects
patterns.description: Tests create both a subject and customer together via createCustomerAndSubject(t, deps.SubjectService, deps.CustomerService, ns, key, name) before creating entitlements.

patterns.name: Hooks registered on connectors after construction
patterns.description: entitlementsubscriptionhook and credithook are registered on connectors after construction via RegisterHooks, mirroring the production wiring order.

key_file_guides.role: Defines Dependencies struct and setupDependencies(t) — the single wiring function that builds all adapters and services using real Postgres (via testutils.InitPostgresDB) and mock streaming.
key_file_guides.watch_for: dbClient.Schema.Create uses context.Background() here (pre-existing, not a model to copy in new code). Adding a new dependency requires extending both the Dependencies struct and the return literal.

key_file_guides.role: Contains scenario-named regression tests (TestGrantExpiringAtReset, TestGrantExpiringAndRecurringAtReset, TestBalanceCalculationsAfterVoiding, TestCreatingEntitlementsForKeyOfArchivedFeatures). Each test reproduces a specific production bug timeline.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Tests rely on exact RFC3339 timestamps to reproduce expiry/reset edge cases — do not normalise or truncate times. Streaming events added with future timestamps are a deliberate hack to avoid 'event in future' errors.

anti_patterns: Importing app/common or any Wire provider set — test wiring must stay independent to avoid import cycles
Using context.Background() in new test code where t.Context() is available
Reusing the same subject key or feature key across tests without isolated setupDependencies calls (each test gets its own DB via pgtestdb isolation)
Adding business logic or helper functions beyond test scaffolding — this package is purely a regression harness
Skipping clock.ResetTime() defer — leaves global clock state dirty for other tests

decisions.decision: Wire from package constructors, not app/common
decisions.rationale: Keeps test helpers isolated from application DI so unrelated wiring changes cannot introduce import cycles or break this test package.

decisions.decision: Scenario tests named after the bug they reproduce
decisions.rationale: Makes it obvious which production edge case each test guards; the comment inside each test documents the original faulty behaviour.
Regression tests need deterministic usage values at exact timestamps; MockStreamingConnector provides this without ClickHouse infrastructure.

code_examples.code:
func TestMyRegressionCase(t *testing.T) {
	defer clock.ResetTime()
	deps := setupDependencies(t)
	defer deps.Close()
	ctx := t.Context()
	assert := assert.New(t)

	clock.SetTime(testutils.GetRFC3339Time(t, "2024-07-01T00:00:00Z"))
	cust := createCustomerAndSubject(t, deps.SubjectService, deps.CustomerService, "namespace-1", "subject-1", "Subject 1")
	// ... create feature, entitlement, grants, add streaming events, assert balance
	_ = cust
	_ = assert
}
